title: Who do you think is more ticklish Asuka or Rei
display_title: Who do you think is more ticklish Asuka or Rei
wikitext:
[]: Who do you think is more ticklish? Asuka or Rei?             Quote Post by offthechainjoe » Fri Aug 28, 2009 8:17 pm Who do you think is more ticklish? Asuka or Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Aug 28, 2009 8:19 pm ok, random. But I have to say neither. Asuka doesnt seem to be the type to me who would be ticklish, and Rei.......... is just Rei.

[]:             Quote Post by child of Lilith » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:04 pm I don’t see ether of them as being more ticklish then the other. They also don’t seem like the type to sit still and let someone tickle them.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:06 pm Hell, no! on Asuka. And for Rei, if she did let you, she'd probably just stare at you like your a friggin moron and wonder what the hell you were doin.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:16 pm Heh? I have difficulty imagining Asuka being tickled for more than a few seconds before reacting violently, but she seems like she'd be more prone to ticklishness (this is apparently a word) than Rei, who would just do one of those looks and leave the room silently.

[]:             Quote Post by backseatjesus » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:19 pm Shinji. He'd scream if you tickle his armpits.

[]:             Quote Post by esselfortium » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:22 pm The thought of Shinji responding with one of his bloodcurdling YIIIAAAAIIGIAHGHHHHHs after someone innocuously snuck up behind him and started tickling him is rather amusing.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:42 pm Tickling Gendo would be a garunteed death sentence.

[]: Re: Who do you think is more ticklish? Asuka or Rei?             Quote Post by thewayneiac » Fri Aug 28, 2009 9:51 pm offthechainjoe wrote: Who do you think is more ticklish? Asuka or Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by Synapsid » Fri Aug 28, 2009 10:00 pm It's kind of a false choice, Asuka is bound to break your arm and Rei has a thing for absorbing them...I wouldn't touch either. backseatjesus wrote: Shinji. He'd scream if you tickle his armpits.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Aug 28, 2009 10:03 pm ^this would make for a ridiculously WAFFy and cute scene, and possibly a prelude to an "intimate" A/S scene

[]:             Quote Post by DatDude » Fri Aug 28, 2009 10:04 pm I think Reis not very reactive so I'd have to go with Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Fri Aug 28, 2009 10:04 pm Asuka.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Aug 28, 2009 10:05 pm I,ve actually read a fic after 3I where Shinji and Asuka end up a couple and there is a tickling scene in it.

[]:             Quote Post by schismatics » Fri Aug 28, 2009 10:21 pm I'd say Asuka. Afterwords of course there would be bloody violent doom...

[]:             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Fri Aug 28, 2009 11:02 pm Asuka is about as ticklish as a cactus, and Rei about as ticklish as a rock.

[]:             Quote Post by TheRatherDVD » Fri Aug 28, 2009 11:15 pm Asuka. That would be funny. Having the "apparently" most mature and tough characters giggle. Great Genius Shinji-Sama wrote: I,ve actually read a fic after 3I where Shinji and Asuka end up a couple and there is a tickling scene in it.

[]:             Quote Post by Great Genius Shinji-Sama » Fri Aug 28, 2009 11:22 pm Neon Genesis Evangelion: These Scars We Bare. I got it from Fanfiction.Net, I forget the author.

[]:             Quote Post by TheRatherDVD » Fri Aug 28, 2009 11:23 pm Thanks. Shinji screaming from the slightest of touches. Oh god that would be funny.

[]:             Quote Post by Adekis » Sat Aug 29, 2009 12:10 am Out of those two? Asuka would react violently. So her. Rei would react... without... reaction.... Shinji, on the other hand, is probably about as ticklish as me. He'd probably squirm to get away, but he'd be so ticklish he'd have no other choice.
